text:
In the first scene, there is an unsettling quietness. The angled view disturbs my sense of orientation, and the empty space almost invites a meditation on absence and anticipation. I feel cautious yet curious, drawn toward the corridor’s unknown.

In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and words about responsive development and intelligent machines, I sense the pulse of innovation. This space feels charged with potential and inquiry. My mind is awakened, poised to engage with questions of technology and coexistence.
